name: @kolm/runtime-build-worker
description: Isolated kolm runtime-build worker. Source-builds llama.cpp at a pinned commit with vendored CMake flags per target architecture. Heavy compile deps (cmake, ninja, cuda toolkit, hip-rocm, vulkan-sdk) live HERE; root kolm install stays light. Wave 219.

system_requires.note: The Node entrypoint detects which compilers + sdks are present and refuses to start with an honest manifest naming what is missing. The kolm root install never pulls these.
